messages.content:
“
非常感谢the authors for the effort put into addressing the issues raised by the reviewers.
如同其他几位审稿人一同指出的一样，这篇文章的方法与之前的方法非常相似，而在 rebuttal 中作者的回复反复强调的是方法的效率更高，但是始终没有讲清楚方法上的不同  
因此我倾向于拒收这篇文章”

“Many thanks to the authors for the effort they put into addressing the issues raised by the reviewers. As several other reviewers have pointed out, the proposed method is very similar to prior work. In the rebuttal, the authors repeatedly emphasize that their approach is more efficient, but they still do not clearly explain what is methodologically different. Therefore, I am inclined to recommend rejection of this paper.”
